name: Mekk-Knight Indigo Eclipse
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>紺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>碧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぺき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>機界騎士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ジャックナイツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If 2 or more cards are in the same column, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in that column. You can only Special Summon "Mekk-Knight Indigo Eclipse" once per turn this way. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 "Mekk-Knight" monster you control; move that target to another of your Main Monster Zones.
mnst_eff: If 2 or more cards are in the same column, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in that column. You can only Special Summon "Mekk-Knight Indigo Eclipse" once per turn this way. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 "Mekk-Knight" monster you control; move that target to another of your Main Monster Zones.
eff: If 2 or more cards are in the same column, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in that column. You can only Special Summon "Mekk-Knight Indigo Eclipse" once per turn this way. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 "Mekk-Knight" monster you control; move that target to another of your Main Monster Zones.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
